facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and stumble into La Place coffee and eatery Phu Quoc. 4.7 stars across 490 reviews. The kind of café that earns that without a PR budget. Good coffee, solid food, zero pretension. Bookmark this before your trip fills up with resort breakfasts you'll regret. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
